name: Clawclave
description: Discord group operations, onboarding state, and prompt context for OpenClaw agent teams.

rootDir.label: OpenClaw data root
rootDir.help: Defaults to the parent OpenClaw data root when available.

goalsFile.label: Group goals file
goalsFile.help: Relative to rootDir unless absolute. Default: workspace/groups/company-goals.json.

memoryDir.label: Transcript memory directory
memoryDir.help: Relative to rootDir unless absolute. Default: memory/clawclave.

onboardingDir.label: Onboarding state directory
onboardingDir.help: Relative to rootDir unless absolute. Default: workspace/groups/onboarding/active.

hostAccountId.label: Host Discord account ID
hostAccountId.help: Only this OpenClaw Discord account sends visible onboarding prompts. Default: tianclaw.

promptContext.label: Inject group context
promptContext.help: When true, Discord group runs receive group goal and onboarding context.

transcriptWriter.label: Record normalized transcripts
transcriptWriter.help: When true, Discord message hooks append normalized JSONL transcript events.

onboarding.label: Track unmapped channels
onboarding.help: When true, unmapped Discord channels create pending onboarding state.

tailEvents.label: Transcript tail events
tailEvents.help: Maximum recent transcript events to inject into prompt context.
